name: Metal Sky Star Acquisition Corp
business: Metal Sky Star Acquisition Corporation is a blank check company incorporated for the purpose of effecting a merger, share exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. Since its IPO, its sole business activity has been identifying and evaluating suitable acquisition transaction candidates and engaging in non-binding discussions with potential target entities. It presently has no revenue and has had losses since inception.

catalysts.event: Deadline to consummate initial business combination
catalysts.sentence: Currently, we have until January 5, 2027 to consummate an initial business combination.

catalysts.event: Shareholders approved extension of business combination deadline to January 5, 2027 with waiver of monthly extension fee
catalysts.sentence: On December 30, 2025, we held an Extraordinary General Meeting of shareholders which approved the proposals to (i) amend the Company's amended and restated memorandum and articles of association to extend the date by which the Company has to consummate a business combination up to twelve (12) times, each such extension for an additional one (1) month, from January 5, 2026 to January 5, 2027, and waive the monthly extension fee;
